title: RollbackContract
description: Standardized undo state a non-git mutating tool must record so its action can be rolled back. git-reversible actions use git.revert instead and do not need this.

target_resource.description: Stable identifier for the external state being mutated.

idempotency_key.description: Unique key so applying the rollback twice is a no-op.

operation.description: Name of the inverse the rollback dispatcher knows how to apply.

state_before.description: Full prior state to restore (FullRollbackPayload form).
